description_long: This is a modern smartwatch with a rectangular, slightly curved display encased in a black housing. The watch face features a vibrant, multi-color digital interface with several circular complications and stylized hands, suggesting a hybrid analog-digital display. The case is attached to a sleek, matte black strap that appears to be made of silicone or rubber, designed for comfort and durability. On the right side of the case, a prominent crown and a red-accented button are visible, likely for navigation and quick access functions. The back of the watch is smooth and unadorned, with no visible sensors or markings. The overall design is minimalist and sporty, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A sleek, black smartwatch with a rectangular digital display and a matte silicone strap, featuring a colorful, hybrid analog-digital watch face.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full digital watch face with colorful complications and the entire length of the black strap.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thin profile, the crown, and the red-accented button on the right side of the case.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the watch case and strap, with no visible sensors or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the left edge of the case and the continuous black strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial features a digital display with a black background, colorful circular complications, and stylized analog hands. There are no numerals, but multiple subdials and icons are present, giving it a modern, chronograph-inspired look.
attribute_strap_type: Matte black silicone strap with a smooth, continuous design and no visible stitching or texture.
attribute_watch_face_display: Hybrid analog-digital display with digital complications, stylized hands, and multiple subdials. The display is vibrant and customizable.
